[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011100 3
1 1111010 5
2 0111101 5
3 1010010 3
4 0101110 4
5 0000011 2
6 1010001 3
7 1001100 3

01 10 0111001 4
12 21 0011101 4
23 32 0011100 3 match 0
34 43 1111010 5 match 1
45 54 0111101 5 match 2
56 65 1010010 3 match 3
67 76 0101110 4 match 4
70 07 0000011 2 match 5

02 20 0100100 2
13 31 0000001 1
24 42 1100110 4
35 53 1000111 4
46 64 1101111 6
57 75 1111100 5
60 06 0101101 4
71 17 0111010 4

47 74 1000001 2
50 05 1111111 a
61 16 0010100 2
72 27 0100111 4
